answers.where: Snowy path outside Frost Keep; hero is fighting an icy enemy while the Keep repair panel shows rooms.
answers.action: Choose one of three rune cards; the header says Choose 1 Rune and each card names its bonus.
answers.response: Gate is DONE, combat is paused for the rune choice, and the selected card will resume the run with a bonus.
answers.reward: Gold and Blocks are visible, Keep Rank advanced to 1, and the next rooms explain Training and Helper unlocks.
answers.game_look: Real hero/enemy/keep sprites, card UI, room repair states, and resource HUD read as a game screen rather than the old four-button debug shop.

next: Continue visual polish with generated room art and stronger animation/audio feedback; do not expand systems until those gaps pass.
